chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-701 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.13446/2015 15.04.2019 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for the witness Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG ---- This Criminal Miscellaneous Application is directed against the order dated 23.12.2015 whereby the learned Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze while allowing Cr.Misc. Appl. No.2828/2015 filed by respondent No.3 herein, under section 22-A-B of Cr.P.C. directed the respondent No.2 (S.H.O. Police Station Kandiao) to record the statement of the respondent No.3 and if a cognizable offence is made out from his statement, he shall record the F.I.R. as per law. It is an admitted position that after passing impugned order, the respondent No.3 died on 10.01.2016 and in the intervening period he did not approach the concerned S.H.O. for recording of his statement, hence proceedings stood abated. This Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed on being infructuous. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
